understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to maneuver selectable pieces (P or S) onto goal positions (+) within a limited step budget per level, progressing through multiple levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shifts the selected piece by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows; walls (#) block movement variably depending on their type; CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at the exact pixel coordinates; boundaries and objects interact dynamically, with movement hints like direction_blocked being heuristics not guaranteeing failure.
